composition.Programmer 1: Fix and enhance main.py backend application for TravelPlanner. Specifically, fix the dashboard() function issue by ensuring the Flask app can correctly render the 'dashboard.html' template. This includes creating the missing 'dashboard.html' template file and all other required HTML template files for the 10 pages described in the requirements document. Each template must implement the specified page design elements with correct IDs and structure to support the frontend rendering. The programmer should coordinate with frontend/UI designers (if any) to ensure templates meet the UI/UX needs and are placed in the correct 'templates' directory for Flask to locate. The task includes verifying that all routes in main.py correctly render their respective templates without template-not-found errors.
